comment.body:
so if only dealer flows are in play, if spot moves up, the longer gamma exposure forces dealers to sell more and more against the upward move.
it slows down the upward momentum, compresses the upward ranges, 
and result volatitity to realize lower lvls

user.name: Alma
user.bio: Privat investor & speculator | Mathematics | Self-made quant | Market researcher | Options and Futures trader

comment.body:
if the spot moves down, dealers are shorter gamma.
so the move has less and less resistance to the downside, so the ranges can expand there.
this naturally makes volatility to realize upward...
spot down/vol up
